name: Extreme Motorsports of California, Inc.
summary: Extreme Motorsports of California, Inc. manufactures and sells sand rails, desert, and dual sport racecars. Extreme Motorsports of California, Inc. was formerly knowns as Xtreme Motorsports of California, Inc. and changed its name to Extreme Motorsports of California, Inc. in May 2007. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Bakersfield, California.
